program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Handling the Q&A at the clinical research kick-off -- clarify, explain and answer with polite, indirect questions -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- Handling Questions (Q&A)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 13 -- Handling Questions (Q&A)

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Paulo from the research team. I have a few questions about the study. Could you tell me when the first phase starts? I also wonder if the budget is ready. One more point: please explain the timeline to the new doctors. If you have any doubt, call me back. Thank you, and please repeat the key dates in your reply.

Hi Fernando, here is a quick tip for the kick-off. When people raise a hard question, stay calm. First, repeat the question to be sure you understand. Then answer briefly and clearly. If you are not sure, say it and explain later. It is fine to clarify a point twice. You handle the Q&A very well.
